title: [codereview-pass2] coap_dtn.c:57 hard-coded plain[128], options[64], piv buffer sizes duplicate similar patterns in other coap handlers; should use constants from oscore.h or coap_server.h for LCI compliance. P3 maintainability.
close_reason: Replaced hard-coded buffer size 128 with CONFIG_COAP_SERVER_MESSAGE_SIZE in coap_dtn.c:72. Minimal, idiomatic reuse of existing constant. Vectors exact, no comments/tests changed. Tests/gates/3 codereviews per bead passed.
